filterizer.label: Filterizer
filterizer.description: Filter markets by specific lines and odds to find single bets.
filterizer.bullet3: Set minimum odds to match your strategy
filterizer.bullet4: Score = historical hit rate for this league/market/line combo

team_totals.label: Team Totals
team_totals.description: Find teams likely to score 2+ goals based on scoring and conceding patterns.
team_totals.bullet1: Choose home or away team context
team_totals.bullet2: We analyze season scoring rates and opponent weakness
team_totals.bullet3: Score = team's goals-per-game average vs opponent concede rate
team_totals.bullet4: This is a statistical average, not a probability or prediction

winner.label: Winner (1X2)
winner.description: Find best value home and away win picks based on our models.
winner.bullet1: Select home or away win outcome
winner.bullet2: Edge % = model probability minus bookmaker implied probability
winner.bullet3: Higher edge means more potential value vs the market price
winner.bullet4: Model probability is derived from historical performance data

ticket_creator.label: Ticket Creator
ticket_creator.description: Build complete betting tickets (parlays) using Green Bucket verified selections.
ticket_creator.bullet1: Only uses historically verified market/league combos (65%+ hit rate)
ticket_creator.bullet2: Model probability = stats-derived chance of selection winning
ticket_creator.bullet3: Edge = model prob minus implied prob from odds (vig not removed)
ticket_creator.bullet4: Ticket probability = product of individual leg model probabilities

ai_analysis.label: AI Analysis
ai_analysis.description: Get AI-powered betting insights and recommendations for selected fixtures.
ai_analysis.bullet3: Check confidence levels for each bet
ai_analysis.bullet4: Make informed decisions with AI assistance

ai_ticket.label: AI Ticket (Safe Mode)
ai_ticket.description: Generates tickets restricted to Green Bucket verified selections only.
ai_ticket.bullet1: Green Bucket = league/market combos with 65%+ historical hit rate
ai_ticket.bullet2: Model probability per leg from combined stats (not from odds)
ai_ticket.bullet3: Edge = model probability minus implied odds probability
ai_ticket.bullet4: Vig is NOT removed from implied probability (intentional simplification)

safe_zone.label: Safe Zone
safe_zone.description: Pre-computed highest-confidence picks from the optimizer pipeline.
safe_zone.bullet1: Confidence = combined stat average vs historical line performance
safe_zone.bullet2: Higher rank means stronger statistical backing for this pick
safe_zone.bullet3: Based on team averages, head-to-head, and league context
safe_zone.bullet4: Different from Ticket Creator edge — this is a ranking, not a probability

btts_index.label: BTTS Index
btts_index.description: Ranks teams by Both Teams To Score rate over recent matches.
btts_index.bullet1: BTTS Rate = % of recent matches where both teams scored
btts_index.bullet3: This is a descriptive stat, not a predictive model
btts_index.bullet4: Compare with odds to find potential value manually
